name: New Century
description_short: New Century Federal Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution based in Joliet, IL, offering deposit accounts, loans, credit cards, and ATM access.
description_long:
New Century Federal Credit Union operates as a traditional credit union serving members in the Joliet, Illinois area. The organization maintains a community-focused approach with physical branch locations and emphasizes personal service over automated channels. According to their website messaging, they prioritize direct member interaction and fee transparency.

The credit union provides a standard range of financial products including online banking, deposit accounts (with CDs offering up to 3.80% APY on 13-month terms), VISA credit cards (8.80% APR), home equity loans (5.90-7.90% APR), and ATM network access. Members can manage accounts through online banking with recently upgraded enrollment requirements. They offer loan applications, check reordering, document upload services, and mobile app access.

New Century distinguishes itself through emphasis on personal service ("Always talk to a person") and advertised fee transparency ("Great service without the fees"). They maintain two physical branch locations in Joliet and New Lenox, Illinois, with dedicated member service support including a dedicated online banking support line (833-596-0755).

As a credit union with only two branch locations in a limited geographic area, New Century primarily serves members in central Illinois. Their product rates are competitive but not exceptionally differentiated from broader banking offerings. The organization is financially sound as an operating credit union but lacks the digital infrastructure or geographic reach of larger institutions.
services: Online banking with login and account management
13-month CDs with stated rates up to 3.80% APY
Debit card services with activation and lost/stolen reporting
Member service support via phone and contact forms
pros: Two physical branch locations with in-person member service in Joliet and New Lenox, IL
Home equity loans available at 5.90-7.90% APR
Fee-transparency messaging and emphasis on avoiding customer fees
Online banking with mobile app access for account management
Dedicated member service support line and online banking support team
Surcharge-free ATM network access for members
cons: Limited geographic footprint with only two branch locations in Illinois; not accessible to most consumers
VISA credit card rate of 8.80% APR is standard to high compared to competitive market offerings
No mention of specific membership eligibility criteria or requirements on publicly available pages
Limited product differentiation; does not offer investment services, wealth management, or specialized lending products
Recent online banking system upgrade created mandatory enrollment friction for existing members
best_for: Current and prospective members in the Joliet and New Lenox, Illinois area seeking community-based banking
Consumers who prefer in-person branch service and personal interaction over digital-only banking
Local members eligible for credit union membership seeking standard deposit and lending products
diagnosis: New Century Federal Credit Union is best for existing or prospective members in the Joliet and New Lenox, Illinois area who prioritize in-person banking relationships and community-focused service. The primary caveat is severely limited geographic accessibility—with only two physical branches, this credit union is not a viable option for consumers outside central Illinois, and its product offerings are standard rather than competitive on rate or features.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: New Century — Credit Union in Joliet, IL | CreditDoc
meta_description: New Century — NCUA-insured credit union in Joliet, IL. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
